case_title: MATILDE RENDEROS et al VS. RICHARD CHRISTOPHER FEJERANG et al

docket_entries.description: ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAY-21-2012. MAR-16-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
